description_long: This is a male adult figure dressed in casual urban attire, featuring a hooded sweatshirt with a front pocket, fitted pants, and athletic sneakers. The figure's posture is slightly hunched forward, with both arms extended downward and hands holding an unusual, elongated, and angular object that appears to be made of a different material than the rest of the body. The face is detailed with short, curly hair and realistic facial features. The hands and forearms are stylized, appearing almost skeletal or mechanical, contrasting with the otherwise naturalistic clothing and body. The overall build is athletic and proportionate, with the clothing fitting snugly and the shoes appearing thick-soled and comfortable for walking. The asset is designed to represent a pedestrian adult in a modern urban environment.
description: A casually dressed male adult with a hoodie, fitted pants, and sneakers, holding an elongated, angular object with stylized hands. The figure has short curly hair and a realistic, athletic build.
description_view_0: Front view showing the face, hoodie details, and both hands holding the angular object.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the face, the hood's shape, and the angular object extending forward.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the hoodie, pants, and the angular object held behind the legs.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the side profile, arm position, and the angular object from a different angle.
attribute_clothing_type: casual hooded sweatshirt and fitted pants
attribute_posture: standing with arms extended forward holding an object
